query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `avaliacao_questionarios` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
	`companyId` int NOT NULL,
	`titulo` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descricao` text,
	`frequencia` enum('diaria','semanal','mensal','trimestral','semestral','anual') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'mensal',
	`ativo` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`criadoPor` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	INDEX `aq_company` (`companyId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `avaliacao_perguntas` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
	`questionarioId` int NOT NULL,
	`texto` text NOT NULL,
	`tipo` enum('nota_1_5','nota_1_10','sim_nao','texto_livre') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'nota_1_5',
	`peso` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`ordem` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`ativo` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	INDEX `ap_questionario` (`questionarioId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `avaliacao_ciclos` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
	`companyId` int NOT NULL,
	`questionarioId` int NOT NULL,
	`titulo` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`dataInicio` date NOT NULL,
	`dataFim` date NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('rascunho','aberto','fechado') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'rascunho',
	`criadoPor` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	INDEX `ac_company` (`companyId`),
	INDEX `ac_questionario` (`questionarioId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `avaliacoes` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
	`cicloId` int NOT NULL,
	`companyId` int NOT NULL,
	`employeeId` int NOT NULL,
	`avaliadorId` int NOT NULL,
	`avaliadorNome` varchar(255),
	`status` enum('pendente','em_andamento','finalizada') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
	`notaFinal` decimal(5,2),
	`observacoes` text,
	`tempoAvaliacao` int,
	`finalizadaEm` timestamp NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	INDEX `av_ciclo` (`cicloId`),
	INDEX `av_company` (`companyId`),
	INDEX `av_employee` (`employeeId`),
	INDEX `av_avaliador` (`avaliadorId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `avaliacao_respostas` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
	`avaliacaoId` int NOT NULL,
	`perguntaId` int NOT NULL,
	`valor` varchar(20),
	`textoLivre` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	INDEX `ar_avaliacao` (`avaliacaoId`),
	INDEX `ar_pergunta` (`perguntaId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `avaliacao_avaliadores` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
	`companyId` int NOT NULL,
	`avaliadorUserId` int NOT NULL,
	`employeeId` int NOT NULL,
	`ativo` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	INDEX `aa_company` (`companyId`),
	INDEX `aa_avaliador` (`avaliadorUserId`),
	INDEX `aa_employee` (`employeeId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `avaliacao_config` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
	`companyId` int NOT NULL,
	`notaMinima` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
	`notaMaxima` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT 5,
	`permitirAutoAvaliacao` tinyint DEFAULT 0,
	`exibirRankingParaAvaliadores` tinyint DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	INDEX `acfg_company` (`companyId`)
);
